title: HPTU Date Sheet 2025 @ himtu.ac.in

detail.title: HPTU Date Sheet 2025 @ himtu.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of HPTU have released the HPTU Date Sheet 2025 for B.Tech, B.Arch, B.Pharm, B.Sc, M.Sc, M.Pharm, MBA and MCA. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: HPTU Date Sheet 2025 is Out! The Himachal Pradesh Technical University has released the B.Tech, B.Arch, B.Pharm, B.Sc, M.Sc, M.Pharm, MBA and MCA. For further updates on HPTU, candidates can follow this page.

rows: B.Tech, B.Arch, B.Pharm, B.Sc, M.Sc, M.Pharm, MBA and MCA

sections.heading: How to Download the HPTU Date Sheet 2025?

content.text: HPTU (Himachal Pradesh Technical University) Date Sheet 2025, visit the HPTU official website, go to the "Examination" or "Notice Board" section, and select the relevant date sheet link to access and download the PDF for your course and semester.​

items: Go to the official HPTU website: https://www.himtu.ac.in.​
Click on “Examination” or go directly to the “Examination Schedule” section: https://www.himtu.ac.in/en/examination.​
Browse the latest notices for “Tentative/Final Date Sheet” links for your course and session (such as BTech, MBA, BSc HMCT, MPharmacy, etc.).​
Click the date sheet link (often a PDF) to open, view, or download it to your device.​
Save or print the PDF for exam reference.
